first_aid: Rest, stay hydrated, and drink warm fluids.
home_remedy: Ginger tea with honey, steam inhalation.
precaution: Avoid cold foods and drinks, wash hands frequently, stay warm.

first_aid: Get plenty of rest and drink plenty of liquids.
home_remedy: Chicken soup, warm baths to reduce fever, herbal teas.
precaution: Isolate from others, wear a mask, cover mouth when coughing.

first_aid: Stop eating for a few hours. Gradually sip water or clear liquids.
home_remedy: Ginger tea, eating bland foods (BRAT diet: bananas, rice, applesauce, toast).
precaution: Avoid dairy, caffeine, alcohol, and spicy/fatty foods until fully recovered.

first_aid: Rest in a quiet, dark room. Apply a cold or warm compress to the head or neck.
home_remedy: Acupressure, drinking plenty of water, consuming a small amount of caffeine.
precaution: Identify and avoid triggers (e.g., certain foods, stress, lack of sleep, bright lights).

first_aid: Rinse nasal passages with a saline solution.
home_remedy: Consuming local honey, using an air purifier, inhaling steam with eucalyptus oil.
precaution: Keep windows closed during high pollen seasons, shower after being outdoors.

first_aid: Sit upright and take slow, deep breaths. Administer rescue inhaler immediately.
home_remedy: Caffeinated coffee or tea (mild bronchodilator effect in emergencies), mustard oil massage on chest.
precaution: Avoid triggers (dust, smoke, cold air, pet dander), always carry a rescue inhaler.

first_aid: Strict bed rest, continuous fluid intake.
home_remedy: Papaya leaf extract (may help increase platelet count), coconut water.
precaution: Use mosquito nets, wear long sleeves, apply mosquito repellent, eliminate standing water.

first_aid: Stand up straight, loosen tight clothing, elevate head while resting.
home_remedy: Chewing gum, mixing baking soda in water (temporary relief), drinking aloe vera juice.
precaution: Eat smaller meals, avoid lying down immediately after eating, avoid spicy and fatty foods.

first_aid: Apply a cold or warm damp compress over the affected eye.
home_remedy: Rose water eye washes (ensure purity), applying cooled chamomile tea bags.
precaution: Wash hands frequently, avoid touching/rubbing eyes, do not share towels or pillows.

first_aid: Stop solid foods, hydrate frequently with small sips of water or electrolyte solutions.
home_remedy: Mint, ginger, BRAT diet when eating resumes.
precaution: Wash hands thoroughly with soap, avoid contaminated water or food.

medicine: Antimalarial drugs (e.g., Artemisinin-based combination therapies (ACTs), Chloroquine)
first_aid: Ensure complete bed rest and manage fever with cold compresses.
home_remedy: Cinnamon tea, fresh fruit juices to boost immunity (medical treatment is mandatory).
precaution: Sleep under insecticide-treated mosquito nets, use bug spray, take prophylactic meds when traveling.

symptoms: tenderness on scalp or neck muscles
first_aid: Massage scalp and temples, practice deep breathing to relax.
home_remedy: Peppermint oil application on temples, applying a heating pad to neck and shoulders.
precaution: Manage stress, correct seating posture, stay hydrated.

first_aid: Sponge baths to lower body temperature, strict bed rest.
home_remedy: Drinking boiled water, consuming soft bland foods like boiled potatoes or rice gruel.
precaution: Ensure safe drinking water, practice good hygiene, avoid street food in endemic areas.

medicine: Acetaminophen (Do NOT use Aspirin in children)
first_aid: Keep fingernails trimmed short to avoid scratching and secondary infections.
home_remedy: Oatmeal baths, applying baking soda paste to lesions.
precaution: Highly contagious; isolate the patient until all blisters have scabbed over.

symptoms: chest pain when breathing or coughing
first_aid: Immediate medical attention required. Provide supplemental oxygen if available and needed.
home_remedy: Drink warm liquids, inhale steam, perform deep breathing exercises as pain tolerates.
precaution: Get vaccinated (Pneumococcal, Flu), practice good hygiene, quit smoking.

first_aid: Rest
home_remedy: Steam inhalation
precaution: Avoid smoking

precaution: Avoid contact

home_remedy: Oatmeal bath
